OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. Now, It stands out as a prominent distributor of super-hit Nepali movie entertainment content on its YouTube channel in the country. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: ST MAN - KALI KALI FT. YUNG 22 & BIG NORZZA ( OFFICAL MUSIC VIDEO )
snippet.description:
Nepal Hiphop Records Presents the official music video of Kali Kali by ST MAN featuring Yung 22 & Big Norzza.
Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.


Audio Credits :
➟ Performed By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
➟ Music Produced By - St Man
➟ Background scoring - St Man
➟ Lyrics By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
➟ Female singer - Somea Baraili
➟ Composed By - St Man & Yung 22
➟ Sarangi - Hemanta Kancha Rasaily
➟ Mix & Master By 8ugustus

Video Credits : Matte studio
➟ Director : Thomas GM 
➟ DOP : nexal thapa 
➟ Edit: thomas gm / nexal thapa
➟ 1st Assistant Camera : Pratik thapa
➟ color: thomas gm
➟ BTS : Arjun
➟ Lights  : Nabin bogati 
➟ Visual concept : ST MAN & Thomas GM
 
 
Project Management  :
 
➟ Artist and Project management: Knack Nepal
➟ Project Head: Niraj Baraili
➟ Production Manager : Shyam Dai 
➟ Flyer & design - Bipshon Design
➟ Stylist / Costume Designer : Tsabinz
➟ Makeup & Hair : Sangita Tamang, Annie Tamang 

Cast
➟ Actor: Ram Chandra Adhikari Aka Gokte Kaji
➟ Model :  Sharon Lepcha Bajracharya & Smriti Tamang

Choreographed by Baigaicha Crew.


Special Thanks to
Yung 22, Big Norzza, BIg Man, Fumu, Carey dai, Sameer dai, Ashok Dai

Subscribe and click the bell icon to get notified.    / @stmanofficial  

Follow me on :
Instagram :   / https://www.instagram.com/stman.official?
Facebook :   /  https://www.facebook.com/share/1DoxDxiBBK/?

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2

Lai bari Lai 
Lai bari Lai 
Maya cha hai dil bhari nai 
Banai khayo dadelo le 
Manai Khayo timro maya le 


Hamro Bhetghat Pahilo Choti Ho ( lhasso )
Bhana Aja kahi katai Jane Ho ( lhasso )
Kusume Rumal Chino Laijau ( Saachai )
Yespali Lane Gari rachu Dai ma ta


Dada Kada Katera Ma sangai Jauna tmi 
Timro mana samma jane bato Dekhaideuna hai 
Maya Tarki farki jharki bhayeni Boli deuna hai

Khelna Deu 
Herna Deu 
Salkeko jawani Fakreko Maya maa Palkeko ma pani 
Cha maya cha katai 
Sirfula Siraima Laidium ki chhapakai


Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2



Mutu Dhak Dhak BP high Body maa Heat 
Chinta Nagara ma Gardimla thik
ausadhi lekhdya chu 7 din ko 
Khop lagai dinchu 7 inch ko 

Dr. St Man Bhaye Kina attina paryo 
Bihana ki diuso ki Rat dina paryo 
Dina maa 5 ki 7 ki 8 Dina paryo 
Vana Body ko kun Part jach dina paryo 

Big House Big Dream Big chain Big Thing 
Living Fast Chasing Dream Lifestyle mainstream 
Deko haina guff 
Maya vanda Badhi Garchau Business Talk 
She don't believe in love tara chaiyo mero love 
Yeah

Aare Aare Aare Aare 
Aare Apango 
Aale Aale Aale Aale 
Aale Apango 
Nga Mula Ela semri taa Mula Ngada Tha mula 
Maya La Mula Chyago 

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Janti boki aula 10 gate bihibar 
Gaubhari masu ra bhat 
Kodo Ko Raksi chyang Nigar Bidi cigar
K khane K piune afno bichar 
Malai daijo maa maya  chaiyo ajambari 
Meri Sakambari timlai samhali  rakchu rakam sari
Ful chari diula timro harek kadam pachi 
Siudo maa timro mang bharidinchu 
9 biga bari timro nam garidinchu 
9 mahina maa ghorle paune kam gardinchu
5 biga garib lai daan garidinchu 

Hooo Hooo Hooo 

Haa

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe


Fulaiko Fulbari maa 
fulai lw Sajaidiula 
Appa Ra Aame le Mane ta 
Aune Saal Bhagai diula 
Pardaina Aatina 
Bichaima Chaddina 
Tayar chu Sath dina 
Hapta ko Sath dina 
Lhassooooo

Chorus 

Kali Kali Katil Nazre Na Dekh Mujhe Aishe
Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Female 

Chadi malai Najau etai 
malai laijau timi sangai 
X2

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: TULSI VIVAH I तुलसी विवाह I SANJANA PANDEY I GOLU TIWARI I OFFICIAL TRAILER INEW BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#sanjanapandey #golutiwari #sanjaypandey #kanchanmishra #aloksingh #prakashajais #nishatiwari #trending #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #tulsivivah 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

फ़िल्म – तुलसी विवाह (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – संजना पांडेय , गोलू तिवारी , संजय पांडेय , कंचन मिश्रा , अलोक सिंह , प्रकाश जैस , निशा तिवारी , पुष्पेंद्र सिंह , श्वेता कुमारी
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
पठकथा - मंजुल ठाकुर , सत्येंद्र सिंह
लेखक - सत्येंद्र सिंह
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - प्यारे लाल यादव
छायांकन - इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - ऑय विज़न स्टूडियो - नागेंद्र यादव
प्रोडक्शन कंट्रोलर – रोशन रॉय , सोनू मिश्रा
लोकल प्रोडक्शन – मुकेश दुबे ,कमलेश सिंह, दुष्यंत सिंह
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – राम दुलारे
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC

सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम –

मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव
B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस -

प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस-

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , रितेश सिंह , हर्षिल शाह , शैलेश त्रिवेदी , प्रफुल गैकवार्ड





FILM- TULSI VIVAH (Bhojpuri film)


STARCAST- SANJANA PANDEY, GOLU TIWARI , SANJAY PANDEY , KANCHAN MISHRA , ALOK SINGH , PRAKASH JAIS , NISHA TIWARI , PUSHPENDRA SINGH , SHWETA KUMARI ,


DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR

CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH

SCREENPLAY – MANJUL THAKUR , SATYENDRA SINGH

WRITER – SATYENDRA SINGH

EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN

CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN

CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)

POST PRODUCTION – Eyevision Studio - Nagendra Yadav

PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN ROY , SONU MISHRA

LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heart… 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji — India’s Greatest Warrior King. 👑 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. 🚩 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh
Music: Ajay-Atul 
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (Asc, Isc)
Story screenplay: Ajit wadekar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Aak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Choreographer: Remo D’souza
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Sound Mixing
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Re-recording mixer:
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of one of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi, and Telugu.
 
1st May 2026
In Cinemas
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 Official Trailer | Avinash Tiwary, Medha Shankr | Prasshant Jha | 24 April 2026
snippet.description:
The madness is back… and this time, it’s bigger, louder, and full-on #BawaalFamilyEntertainer

Ginny and Sunny return to a new phase of love, marriage, and family chaos. But when expectations clash, secrets unfold, and relatives get a little too involved… things spiral into a rollercoaster of emotions, laughter, and full desi drama.
Get ready for a sequel where love gets messier, families get louder, and every moment is pure entertainment.

Z Studios and Soundrya Production Present
A Soundrya Production Film
Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 In Cinemas 24th APRIL 2026

Credits 
Written and Directed by Prasshant Jha
Produced by Vinod Bachchan & Umesh Kumar Bansal  
Co- Producer – Manju Bachchan  
Creative Producer – Soundarya Bachchan
Associate Producer – Rakesh Madhotra  
Director of Photography – Archit Patel  
Editor – Bunty Nagi  
Costume Designer – Nidhi Yasha  
Production Designer – Sachin Khate  
Choreographer – Adil Shaikh

Action Director – Vikram Dahiya

snippet.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)
Additional Vocal - Vipul Pandey , Gangesh Raja , Ajay Singh Aj

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana 

Learn to sing in Sur with AI Powered Personal Music Teacher- Padhanisa by Saregama. Download Padhanisa App now; https://sarega.ma/padhanisa

Follow us on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/3FxwPgo 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/32rkJqM
X: https://x.com/saregamaglobal

Label:: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

snippet.title: Bhoot Bangla Trailer Review
snippet.description:
A cautiously hopeful take that Bhoot Bangla brings back classic Akshay Kumar energy and Priyadarshan’s style, but risks relying too much on old tropes and still has a lot to prove. #BhootBangla #PJExplained #thePJ

If you love movies, you belong on Moctale — https://www.moctale.in

WhatsApp: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
thePJ: https://www.youtube.com/@thepjoffical

Threads: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
SnapChat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained
Business Mail: teamthepj@gmail.com

The PJ Explained is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: Dhanyabad Nepali | Badhai Badhai yo deshlai badhai | Dedicated song to Balen & Government | Official
snippet.description:
Aagyat Presents: New Nepali Song 

|| Dhanyabad Nepali | Badhai Badhai Yo Desh Lai Badhai | Balen Song ||

#aagyat #newsong #nepalisong #aagyat #balenshah  #balen  #nepalisong  #newnepalisong  #nepalimusicvideo  
#nepalilovesongs  #nepalisadsongs  #balennews   #NepaliFilmSong 
#nepaliaudiostory  #NepaliVideo #NepaliTrending #NepaliHitSong 
#OfficialSong #OfficialVideo #lovestorysong  #dhanyabad   #EmotionalSong 
#nepalilokgeet  #nepalimodernsong  #nepalimusic  #nepaliviralsong #dhanyabadnepali 
----------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janata lai…

Jaya Mahakaali
Jaya Nepal
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janata lai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Purano sab bye bye, aba khel naya
Congress UML Maoist? sabai lai nai nai
Janata ko awaj uthyo sadak dekhi sansad
Aba janata jagyo, sakiyo purano natak
Rabi dai, Balen high high
Janata ko mutuma naya lahar cha bhai
Naya cha party, naya cha sarkar
Aba janata le paaunchha aafno adhikar
“Adhikar!”

“Naya sarkar!”

Gut chaina, loot chaina, aba phut chaina
Desh banaune jimma timilai chhut chaina
Puranaka  para le dukh paaye Sara le
Wakk ra dikk janata timra thotra nara le

Saath diyeko ma Nepali ama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen!

Naya banos desh, naya paribesh
Bhrashtachar hatos, nahos kunai case
Karnali ka janata aba niras hunu pardaina
Sitomol ko aasma aba bachnu pardaina

“Aba pardaina…”
Himal, pahad, tarai eutai awaj
Bikash ko baato aba khuldai cha aaj
Bichauliya dalal le khaana napawos
Sahid ko ragat kahilyai jana napaos
Sambidhaan sanshodhan? yadi chahinchha bhane gar
Tara janata ko maang puraa garne jimma tero bhar
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai
Saath diyeko ma…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepalai


Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Yo desh haamro…
Yo maato haamro…
Aba haamile banaune ho…

“Banaune ho…”

Badhai badhai yo deshlaai badhai
Dui tihai ko Balen sarkarlaai badhai
Janata ko jit ho, yo kunai khel hoina
Aba paribartan aayo, yo sapana hoina
Hath ma shakti, saathma janata
Aba kasaile rokna sakdaina yo yaatra
Itihaas lekhdai cha naya pustale
Nepal uthdai cha aafnai hastaksharle
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!!!

Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janataalai…
---------------------------------------
♪ ♪♪ Audio Credits:- 
Song:- 
♬ Dhanyabad Nepali धन्यबाद नेपाली

♬ Vocal:-
Aagyat

♬ Lyrics: 
Ramesh Luitel
Sujan Koirala

snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING ⚠️
This summer just got HOTTER🔥

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
➟ Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
➟ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

MUKHDA 
(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4

है थोड़ा बेसुरा
पर दिल में ताल है
इसको हम नाचने से
टोकें(bindi)  कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4

नच्चाँ(bindi)  आज मैं शुकर मना के
सोणे यार तों(bindi)  नज़रें मिला के
मैनू लोड़ किसे दी कोई ना
सारे जग दी लाज भुला के

चल mood बना के सूफ़ी
थोड़ी कर लें(bindi)  बेवकूफ़ी
चूल्हे में जाये मितरा
दुनिया भर की मसरूफ़ी

पैरों को पर लगने से रोकें(bindi)  कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4


ANTARA

वे रान्झा आग है जितनी इधर लगी
तू भी मान ले दुगनी उधर लगी

दोनों दिल ही बराबर झुलस गये 
फेर.. जाण दे कितनी किधर लगी
(Not phir but Pher)

अज यार दे करके सदक़े(nukhta)
मैंने प्याले प्याले गटके
चल देखें(bindi)  दिल पटरी से
आख़िर(nukhta)  कब तक ना भटके

देंगे भी दूजे को धोखे कब तलक..

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले तब तलक) ×2

बहकी जवानियाँ जैसे बारूद हैं(bindi)
देखें(bindi)  उठते नहीं हैं(bindi)
शोले कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले तब तलक) ×2

© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

SUNIL SHAHI 
BINOD DHAKAL 
RAJESH OLI
BIMAL SUBEDI
DINESH KC
BIKASH THAPA
GAJUREL THAQURI

--------------------------------------------

Lyrics :-

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma

snippet.title: Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎧 Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics)
🔔 Subscribe & turn on notifications to stay on the Pulse
⬇️ Stream/Download: https://Powfu.lnk.to/ListenID

Follow Powfu
https://www.instagram.com/pow.fu
https://www.facebook.com/PowfuOfficial
https://www.tiktok.com/@pow.fu

📄 Lyrics: Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head)

Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Yeah, I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future 'cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you've been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hopin' you'll find someone else
'Cause yeah, we still young, there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it out this bed
I hope I go to heaven so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

Lyrics for "Lauv - I Like Me Better"

[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee, burning through the hours talking
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you swear the room, yeah, it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking, I might have to tell you something
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (yes I do, yes I do, babe)
I like me better when I'm with you (oooh noo)
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh noo)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

×=×=×=×=×

snippet.title: Pardeshma Mera Swami (Official Video)| Haribhakta Budhathoki | Tek BC | Rekha Joshi | Santosh Sunar
snippet.description:
Pardeshma Mera Swami (Official Video)| Haribhakta Budhathoki | Tek BC | Rekha Joshi | Santosh Sunar

🎵 Pardeshma Mero Swami | Official Video 🎵

Lyrics & Presentation: Haribhakta Budhathoki

A deeply emotional song that reflects the pain, love, and longing of a wife whose husband is far away in a foreign land. Pardeshma Mero Swami beautifully captures the reality of distance, sacrifice, and unbreakable connection of hearts.

snippet.title: The Last Letter (Lyrics) - Maan Panu
snippet.description:
#TheLastLetter #MaanPanu

The Last Letter (Lyrics) - Maan Panu

Song Name: The Last Letter
Lyrics: Maan Panu
Music Producer: Mazaak
Composed by: Maan Panu
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika

Lyrics:

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Tune na jaana tere jaane se kya kya hua
Kitni kahani bani kitna tamasha hua
Jaane tu kaisi hogi aur voh deewana tera
Khush tu bhi kya hi hogi aur kya salona jahan

Mera sara badan tha so raha
Bas aankh reh gayi thi
Aisa lag raha tha mar gaye
Bas saans reh gayi thi

Tum phool chura ke chal diye
Bas shaakh reh gayi thi
Tum shama bujha ke chal diye
Bas raakh reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Bas tera naam reh gaya

#MaanPanu #TheLastLetter

Tum phool chura ke chal diye

snippet.title: BEZAF - Saad Lamjarred | Neha Kakkar | Shehnaaz Gill | Rajat Nagpal | Charif Bennis | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Bezaf featuring Saad Lamjarred & Shehnaaz Gill.

Streaming link 👉🏼 https://VirginMusicGroup.lnk.to/Bezaf

Audio Credits :-
Singer : Saad Lamjared & Neha Kakkar 
Music Composer : Charif Bennis & Rajat Nagpal 
Lyrics : Saad Lamjarred, Charif Bennis & Rana Sotal
Music Producer : Tarik Lahjaily
Flute : Adil charfi   
Music arrangement : Tarik lahjaili

Video Credits :-

https://www.virginmusic.com/

Team : Nagesh Jadhav, Kajal Israni, Amol Suryavanshi, Lavanya Das & Nishtha Sikroria

Travel and Hospitality Partner : PRM Hospitality

Lyrics :-
Raaton may jagaye mujhey khaab tere ,,
Raanjhay mere ,,o mirzay mere
Bhar bahrke chalku pyaar may tere,,Pyaar may tere
Raanjhay mere ,,o mirzay mere ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Jag tu mera ,,
Rab tu mera ,,
Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

Ajaz lesani
Ma khallali manqool
Allil aliya tool sahraan
Khallani sahraan khallani
(I’m at a loss for words,
There’s nothing left unsaid.
The night stretches long,
Leaving me awake, leaving me restless.)

-Ya njoum samaa
Bghito ana mn awal kelma
Haqiqa mashi hlema
F’tariqo rah dani
(Oh stars in the sky,
I sought you from the very first word.
A truth, not a dream,
Your path led me here.)

Saans hai tumse ,,
Aas hai tumse,,
Chahat ki har ,,
Pyaas hai tumse ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Mera shingaar tu ,,
Hm ranihaar tu,,
Aaja piya aaja 
Najar utaar du ,,

Karti hai ishaaray ,,
Kispe dil haare ,,
Yeh paayal puchay,,
Hai tere baare ,,
Hai tere bare ,,

AyAmi li fatet kablek maliha maana 
Chkoun yjini fhalek ya momo ayniya…momo ayniya 
Ya jamalek ya jamalek ….
(My days before i met you… had no meaning,
Who could ever be like you, oh delight of my eyes ?!
Allah … your beauty Oh god your beauty is unbelievable I never saw like it before …) 

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Saans hai tumse ,,
Aas hai tumse,,
Chahat ki har ,,
Pyaas hai tumse ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
W ghnhebbek bzaaf
Bhal zinek l’lam ma shaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply,
And I’ll always love you.
Your beauty is unmatched in the world.)

Jag tu mera ,,
Rab tu mera ,,
Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

Nhebbek bzaaf, hbeitak bzaaf
(I love you so much, I’ve loved you deeply)

Qismat barkat ,,
Sab tu mera ,,

#Bezaf #saadlamjarred #nehakakkar #shehnaazgill #newsong #international #viral #trending

snippet.title: Måneskin - Beggin' (Testo/(Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (🔔) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

Follow Måneskin:
https://www.instagram.com/maneskinofficial
https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial
https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out, darlin'

[Verse 1]
Ridin' high when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you warned me then
But easy come and easy go and it would end

[Verse 2]
So anytime I bleed, you let me go
Yah, anytime I feed, you get me, no
Anytime I seek, you let me know
But I plant and seed, just let me go
I'm on my knees when I'm beggin'
'Cause I don't wanna lose you
Hey, yeah, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm beggin', beggin' you
Uh, put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you, ah
And put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Verse 3]
I need you to understand
Tried so hard to be your man
The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

[Verse 4]
An empty shell, I used to be
The shadow of my life was hangin' over me
A broken man that I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance to win my soul

[Verse 5]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?
Why the bottom? Why the basement?
Why we got good shit, don't embrace it?
Why the feel for the need to replace me?
You're the wrong way track from the good
I wanna paint a picture tellin' where we could be at
Like a heart in the best way should
You can give it away, you had it and you took the pay
But I keep walkin' on, keep openin' doors
Keep hopin' for, now the door is yours
Keep also home
'Cause I don't wanna live in a broken home, girl, I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
Mmm, yeah, yeah, I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Bridge]
I'm fightin' hard to hold my own
Just can't make it all alone
I'm holdin' on, I can't fall back
I'm just a calm, 'bout to fade to black

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Outro]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out

O que estamos fazendo? O que estamos perseguindo?

de-DE.title: Moonlight - Beggin' (Testo/(Lyrics)
de-DE.description:
Abonniere und aktiviere die Benachrichtigungen (🔔), um keine neuen Uploads zu verpassen!

Folge Måneskin:
https://www.instagram.com/maneskinofficial
https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial
https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Songtext:

[Intro]
Streck mir deine Hand hin, Baby
Denn ich flehe dich an

[Chorus]
Ich flehe dich an
Also streck mir deine Hand hin, Baby
Ich flehe dich an
Also streck mir deine Hand hin, Liebling

[Verse 1]
Ich war der König, als ich noch ganz oben war
Ich habe alles gegeben, denn ich hatte alles
Ich bin gegangen, du hast mich gewarnt
Aber wie es so schön heißt: schnell gewonnen, schnell verloren

[Verse 2]
Also, wann immer ich blute, lässt du mich Los geht's
Ja, immer wenn ich esse, bekommst du mich, nein
Immer wenn ich suche, lässt du mich wissen
Aber ich säe und säe, lass mich einfach gehen
Ich knie nieder, wenn ich bettle
Denn ich will dich nicht verlieren
Hey, ja, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Refrain]
Denn ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Uh, streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an, ah
Und streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Liebling

[Strophe 3]
Ich brauche dein Verständnis
Ich habe so sehr versucht, dein Mann zu sein
Der Mann, den du am Ende willst
Nur dann kann ich wieder anfangen zu leben

[Strophe 4]
Eine leere Hülle war ich einst
Der Schatten meines Lebens hing über mir
Ein gebrochener Mann, den ich nicht kenne
Der nicht einmal den Tanz des Teufels ertragen will, um meine Seele zu gewinnen

[Strophe 5]
Was tun wir? Was jagen wir?
Warum der Tiefpunkt? Warum der Keller?
Warum nutzen wir unsere guten Sachen nicht?
Warum das Bedürfnis, mich zu ersetzen?

Du bist auf dem falschen Weg, weg vom Guten.
Ich will dir ein Bild malen, wo wir sein könnten.
So wie es ein Herz im besten Sinne tun sollte.
Du kannst es weggeben, du hattest es und hast die Quittung bekommen.
Aber ich gehe weiter, öffne immer neue Türen.
Hoffe weiter, denn jetzt gehört dir die Tür.
Bleib auch zu Hause.

Denn ich will nicht in einem zerbrochenen Zuhause leben, Mädchen, ich flehe dich an.

[Refrain]
Mmm, ja, ja, ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an.

Also streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Baby.

Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an.

Also streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Liebling.

[Bridge]
Ich kämpfe hart, um auf eigenen Beinen zu stehen.
Ich schaffe es einfach nicht allein.
Ich halte durch, ich kann nicht zurückfallen.
Ich bin nur noch ruhig, kurz davor zu verblassen. Schwarz

[Refrain]
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Liebling
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Liebling

[Outro]
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus

es-US.description:

Letra:

[Introducción]
Extiende tu mano, cariño
Porque te lo ruego

[Estribillo]
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano, mi amor

[Estrofa 1]
En la cima cuando era rey
Jugué duro y rápido, porque lo tenía todo
Me fui, me lo advertiste entonces
Pero lo que fácil viene, fácil se va, y todo terminaría

[Estrofa 2]
Así que cada vez que sangro, me dejas ir
Sí, cada vez que me alimento, tú No me busques, no
Siempre que te busco, me lo haces saber
Pero siembro y siembro, déjame ir
Estoy de rodillas cuando te ruego
Porque no quiero perderte
¡Oye, sí, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Estribillo]
Porque te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Uh, extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego, ah
Y extiende tu mano amorosa, mi amor

[Estrofa 3]
Necesito que lo entiendas
Me esforcé tanto por ser tu hombre
El tipo de hombre que quieres al final
Solo entonces podré volver a vivir

[Estrofa 4]
Un cascarón vacío, solía ser
La sombra de mi vida me perseguía
Un hombre roto que no conozco
Ni siquiera soportaré el baile del diablo para ganar mi alma

[Estrofa 5]
¿Qué estamos haciendo? ¿Qué estamos persiguiendo?

¿Por qué el fondo? ¿Por qué el sótano?

¿Por qué tenemos cosas buenas y no las aprovechamos?

¿Por qué esta necesidad de reemplazarme?
Eres el camino equivocado, lejos del bien
Quiero pintar un cuadro que muestre dónde podríamos estar
Como un corazón en el mejor sentido
Puedes regalarlo, lo tuviste y te llevaste el pago
Pero sigo caminando, sigo abriendo puertas
Sigo esperando, ahora la puerta es tuya
Quédate también en casa
Porque no quiero vivir en un hogar roto, chica, te lo ruego

[Estribillo]
Mmm, sí, sí, te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, nena
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño

[Puente]
Lucho con todas mis fuerzas para mantenerme firme
No puedo hacerlo solo
Me aferro, no puedo retroceder
Solo estoy tranquilo, a punto de desvanecerme en la oscuridad

[Estribillo]
Soy Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, mi amor
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, mi amor

[Outro]
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa

snippet.title: Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala
snippet.description:
Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala

Song : Dil Kehta Hai 
Singer : Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
Lyrics : Majrooh Sultanpuri
Music : Anu Malik
Director : Mansoor Khan
Producer : Ratan Jain
Star Cast : Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala.

Song Lyrics-

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Hum jab se hain judaa
Ae mere hum nasheen
Yun dekho to mere
Daaman mein kya nahin
Daulat ka chaand hai
Shohrat ki chaandni
Magar tumhe khoke
Lage hai mujhe aisa
Ke tum nahin to kuch bhi nahin
Tum kya jaano ab hum kitna
Dil hi dil mein pachtaate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Voh din the kya haseen
Dono the saath mein
Aur baahein aap ki thi
Mere haath mein
Tum hi tum hai sanam
Mere din raat mein
Par itni bulandi pe
Tum ho meri jaan
Aaye na daaman ab haath mein
Paana tumko mumkin hi nahin
Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain.

snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Katy Perry - The One That Got Away
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

Katy Perry - The One That Got Away

(Letra):
[Verso 1]
Verão depois do ensino médio, quando nos conhecemos
A gente se pegava no seu Mustang ouvindo Radiohead
E no meu aniversário de dezoito anos, fizemos tatuagens iguais
Costumávamos roubar a bebida dos seus pais e subir no telhado
Falávamos sobre o nosso futuro como se soubéssemos de alguma coisa

Eu seria sua namorada
Cumpriríamos todas as nossas promessas

[Couplet 1]
L'été après le lycée, quand on s'est rencontrés,

On s'embrassait dans ta Mustang sur du Radiohead.

Et pour mes dix-huit ans, on s'est fait tatouer le même motif.

On piquait les bouteilles de tes parents et on grimpait sur le toit.

On parlait de notre avenir comme si on savait tout.

Nous serions nous-mêmes contre le monde.

Je te ferais rester.

It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Qu'est-ce que Roblox ? Roblox est un univers virtuel en ligne où les enfants de tous âges peuvent interagir, créer, s'amuser et apprendre en toute sécurité. bn.description:
আজ আমি ব্রেইনরটসের জন্য রোবলক্স শুট জম্বিস খেলেছি! কী হয় তা জানতে পুরো ভিডিওটি দেখতে ভুলবেন না।

--সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া--

ডিসকর্ড: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

রোবলক্স গ্রুপ: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

রোবলক্স নাম: TheRealFoltyn

ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

টুইটার: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

রোবলক্স কী? রোবলক্স হলো একটি অনলাইন ভার্চুয়াল খেলার মাঠ এবং কর্মশালা, যেখানে সব বয়সের শিশুরা নিরাপদে একে অপরের সাথে যোগাযোগ করতে, কিছু তৈরি করতে, মজা করতে এবং শিখতে পারে। এর বিশেষত্ব হলো, ROBLOX-এর প্রায় সবকিছুই কমিউনিটির সদস্যদের দ্বারা ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করা হয়। ROBLOX মূলত ১৩ থেকে ১৮ বছর বয়সীদের জন্য তৈরি, কিন্তু এটি সব বয়সের মানুষের জন্য উন্মুক্ত। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড় একটি অ্যাভাটার বেছে নিয়ে এবং সেটিকে একটি পরিচয় দিয়ে খেলা শুরু করে। এরপর তারা ROBLOX-এ ঘুরে বেড়াতে পারে — চ্যাট করে, গেম খেলে বা সৃজনশীল প্রকল্পে সহযোগিতা করে অন্যদের সাথে যোগাযোগ স্থাপন করতে পারে। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড়কে তাদের নিজস্ব এক টুকরো অনুন্নত জমি এবং একটি ভার্চুয়াল টুলবক্সও দেওয়া হয়, যা দিয়ে তারা যেকোনো কিছু ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করতে পারে — তা হতে পারে চলাচলযোগ্য একটি আকাশচুম্বী ভবন, একটি সচল হেলিকপ্টার, একটি বিশাল পিনবল মেশিন, একটি মাল্টিপ্লেয়ার “ক্যাপচার দ্য ফ্ল্যাগ” গেম বা অন্য কোনো অকল্পনীয় সৃষ্টি। এই প্রথম ভার্চুয়াল জমির প্লটটির জন্য কোনো খরচ নেই। অংশগ্রহণ করে এবং চমৎকার জিনিস তৈরি করে, ROBLOX-এর সদস্যরা বিশেষ ব্যাজ এবং ROBLOX ডলার (“Robux”) অর্জন করতে পারে। এর মাধ্যমে, তারা অনলাইন ক্যাটালগ থেকে অ্যাভাটারের পোশাক ও আনুষঙ্গিক জিনিসপত্র, সেইসাথে প্রিমিয়াম নির্মাণ সামগ্রী, ইন্টারেক্টিভ উপাদান এবং সচল যন্ত্রাংশ কিনতে পারে।

#রোব্লক্স #ফলটিন

ml.title: ബ്രെയിൻറോട്ടുകൾക്കായി റോബ്ലോക്സ് സോമ്പികളെ വെടിവച്ചു..

ഇന്ന് ഞാൻ ബ്രെയിൻറോട്ടുകൾക്കായി റോബ്‌ലോക്സ് ഷൂട്ട് സോംബികളെ കളിച്ചു! എന്താണ് സംഭവിക്കുന്നതെന്ന് കണ്ടെത്താൻ മുഴുവൻ വീഡിയോയും കാണുന്നത് ഉറപ്പാക്കുക.

വ്യാപാരം: https://foltyn.shop/

പെർക്കുകളിലേക്ക് ആക്‌സസ് ലഭിക്കാൻ ഈ ചാനലിൽ ചേരുക:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

റോബ്‌ലോക്സ് ഗ്രൂപ്പ്: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

റോബ്‌ലോക്സ് പേര്: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynn

എന്താണ് റോബ്‌ലോക്സ്? എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള കുട്ടികൾക്ക് സുരക്ഷിതമായി ഇടപഴകാനും സൃഷ്ടിക്കാനും ആസ്വദിക്കാനും പഠിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു ഓൺലൈൻ വെർച്വൽ കളിസ്ഥലവും വർക്ക്‌ഷോപ്പുമാണ് ROBLOX. ROBLOX-ലെ പ്രായോഗികമായി എല്ലാം കമ്മ്യൂണിറ്റിയിലെ അംഗങ്ങൾ രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്ത് നിർമ്മിച്ചതാണ് എന്നതാണ് ഇതിന്റെ പ്രത്യേകത. ROBLOX 13 മുതൽ 18 വയസ്സ് വരെ പ്രായമുള്ളവർക്കായി രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്‌തിട്ടുണ്ടെങ്കിലും എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള ആളുകൾക്കും ഇത് തുറന്നിരിക്കുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും ഒരു അവതാർ തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്ത് അതിന് ഒരു ഐഡന്റിറ്റി നൽകുന്നതിലൂടെയാണ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത്. തുടർന്ന് അവർക്ക് ROBLOX പര്യവേക്ഷണം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയും - ചാറ്റ് ചെയ്തുകൊണ്ടോ, ഗെയിമുകൾ കളിച്ചോ, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ സൃഷ്ടിപരമായ പ്രോജക്റ്റുകളിൽ സഹകരിച്ചോ മറ്റുള്ളവരുമായി ഇടപഴകുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും അവരുടേതായ വികസിപ്പിക്കാത്ത റിയൽ എസ്റ്റേറ്റ് കഷണവും, എന്തും രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്യാനും നിർമ്മിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു വെർച്വൽ ടൂൾബോക്സും നൽകുന്നു - അത് ഒരു നാവിഗേറ്റ് ചെയ്യാവുന്ന അംബരചുംബി, പ്രവർത്തിക്കുന്ന ഹെലികോപ്റ്റർ, ഒരു ഭീമൻ പിൻബോൾ മെഷീൻ, ഒരു മൾട്ടിപ്ലെയർ "ക്യാപ്ചർ ദി ഫ്ലാഗ്" ഗെയിം അല്ലെങ്കിൽ മറ്റേതെങ്കിലും, ഇതുവരെ സ്വപ്നം കാണാത്ത സൃഷ്ടി. വെർച്വൽ ഭൂമിയുടെ ഈ ആദ്യ പ്ലോട്ടിന് യാതൊരു ചെലവുമില്ല. പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും രസകരമായ കാര്യങ്ങൾ നിർമ്മിക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും, ROBLOX അംഗങ്ങൾക്ക് സ്പെഷ്യാലിറ്റി ബാഡ്ജുകളും ROBLOX ഡോളറുകളും ("Robux") നേടാൻ കഴിയും. അതാകട്ടെ, അവതാർ വസ്ത്രങ്ങളും അനുബന്ധ ഉപകരണങ്ങളും വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് ഓൺലൈൻ കാറ്റലോഗിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങാനും പ്രീമിയം നിർമ്മാണ സാമഗ്രികൾ, സംവേദനാത്മക ഘടകങ്ങൾ, പ്രവർത്തന സംവിധാനങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ വാങ്ങാനും കഴിയും.

#Roblox #foltyn

디스코드: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox 그룹: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox 닉네임: TheRealFoltyn

인스타그램: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

트위터: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Roblox란 무엇일까요? Roblox는 모든 연령대의 아이들이 안전하게 소통하고, 만들고, 즐기고, 배울 수 있는 온라인 가상 놀이터이자 작업 공간입니다. ROBLOX는 거의 모든 콘텐츠를 커뮤니티 회원들이 직접 디자인하고 제작한다는 점에서 독특합니다. ROBLOX는 13세에서 18세 사이의 사용자를 위해 설계되었지만, 모든 연령대의 사람들이 이용할 수 있습니다. 모든 플레이어는 아바타를 선택하고 자신만의 정체성을 부여하는 것으로 시작합니다. 그런 다음 ROBLOX를 탐험하며 다른 사용자와 채팅하고, 게임을 플레이하고, 창의적인 프로젝트를 공동 작업하는 등 다양한 방식으로 소통할 수 있습니다. 각 플레이어에게는 개발되지 않은 가상 토지와 가상 도구 상자가 제공되어 무엇이든 디자인하고 만들 수 있습니다. 실제로 움직일 수 있는 고층 빌딩, 작동하는 헬리콥터, 거대한 핀볼 기계, 멀티플레이어 "깃발 뺏기" 게임, 또는 아직 상상조차 하지 못한 창작물까지 만들어낼 수 있습니다. 이 첫 번째 가상 토지는 무료로 제공됩니다. ROBLOX 회원들은 참여하고 멋진 작품을 만들면서 특별 배지와 ROBLOX 달러("Robux")를 획득할 수 있습니다. 획득한 Robux로는 온라인 카탈로그에서 아바타 의상과 액세서리, 프리미엄 건축 자재, 상호 작용 구성 요소, 작동 메커니즘 등을 구매할 수 있습니다.

Roblox ਕੀ ਹੈ? ROBLOX ਇੱਕ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਖੇਡ ਦਾ ਮੈਦਾਨ ਅਤੇ ਵਰਕਸ਼ਾਪ ਹੈ, ਜਿੱਥੇ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚੇ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਢੰਗ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਮੌਜ-ਮਸਤੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਿੱਖ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਇਹ ਇਸ ਪੱਖੋਂ ਵਿਲੱਖਣ ਹੈ ਕਿ ROBLOX 'ਤੇ ਲਗਭਗ ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਭਾਈਚਾਰੇ ਦੇ ਮੈਂਬਰਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾਈ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ROBLOX 13 ਤੋਂ 18 ਸਾਲ ਦੀ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚਿਆਂ ਲਈ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ, ਪਰ ਇਹ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਲਈ ਖੁੱਲ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਇੱਕ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਚੁਣ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਪਛਾਣ ਦੇ ਕੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ। ਉਹ ਫਿਰ ROBLOX ਦੀ ਪੜਚੋਲ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ — ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਕੇ, ਗੇਮਾਂ ਖੇਡ ਕੇ, ਜਾਂ ਰਚਨਾਤਮਕ ਪ੍ਰੋਜੈਕਟਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਕਰਕੇ ਦੂਜਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਦੇ ਹੋਏ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਟੂਲਬਾਕਸ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਆਪਣੀ ਅਣਵਿਕਸਿਤ ਰੀਅਲ ਅਸਟੇਟ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਟੁਕੜਾ ਵੀ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨਾਲ ਉਹ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ — ਭਾਵੇਂ ਇਹ ਇੱਕ ਨੇਵੀਗੇਬਲ ਸਕਾਈਸਕ੍ਰੈਪਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈਲੀਕਾਪਟਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਵਿਸ਼ਾਲ ਪਿੰਨਬਾਲ ਮਸ਼ੀਨ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਮਲਟੀਪਲੇਅਰ "ਕੈਪਚਰ ਦ ਫਲੈਗ" ਗੇਮ ਹੋਵੇ ਜਾਂ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰ, ਅਜੇ ਤੱਕ ਸੁਪਨੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਹੀਂ ਆਈ ਰਚਨਾ। ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ ਦੇ ਇਸ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਪਲਾਟ ਲਈ ਕੋਈ ਕੀਮਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ। ਹਿੱਸਾ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਵਧੀਆ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਬਣਾ ਕੇ, ROBLOX ਮੈਂਬਰ ROBLOX ਡਾਲਰਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਬੈਜ ("Robux") ਵੀ ਕਮਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਬਦਲੇ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਕੱਪੜੇ ਅਤੇ ਸਹਾਇਕ ਉਪਕਰਣਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਮੀਅਮ ਬਿਲਡਿੰਗ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ, ਇੰਟਰਐਕਟਿਵ ਹਿੱਸੇ ਅਤੇ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਵਿਧੀਆਂ ਖਰੀਦਣ ਲਈ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਕੈਟਾਲਾਗ ਖਰੀਦ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ।

Co to jest Roblox? ROBLOX to wirtualny plac zabaw i warsztat online, gdzie dzieci w każdym wieku mogą bezpiecznie wchodzić w interakcje, tworzyć, bawić się i uczyć. Jego wyjątkowość polega na tym, że praktycznie wszystko w ROBLOX jest projektowane i konstruowane przez członków społeczności. ROBLOX jest przeznaczony dla osób w wieku od 13 do 18 lat, ale jest otwarty dla osób w każdym wieku. Każdy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu tożsamości. Następnie może odkrywać ROBLOX — wchodząc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub współpracę przy kreatywnych projektach. Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny kawałek niezagospodarowanej nieruchomości wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może projektować i budować cokolwiek — czy to nawigowalny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Capture the Flag” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Ta pierwsza wirtualna działka jest darmowa. Uczestnicząc w zabawie i budując fajne rzeczy, członkowie ROBLOX mogą zdobywać specjalne odznaki, a także dolary ROBLOX („Robux”). Z kolei użytkownicy mogą przeglądać katalog online, aby kupić ubrania i akcesoria awatara, a także wysokiej jakości materiały budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i mechanizmy robocze.

¿Qué es Roblox? Roblox es un mundo virtual online donde niños y niñas de todas las edades pueden interactuar, crear, divertirse y aprender de forma segura. Es único porque prácticamente todo en ROBLOX está diseñado y construido por los miembros de la comunidad. ROBLOX está diseñado para jóvenes de 13 a 18 años, pero está abierto a personas de todas las edades. Cada jugador comienza eligiendo un avatar y dándole una identidad. Luego, puede explorar ROBLOX, interactuando con otros mediante el chat, jugando o colaborando en proyectos creativos. Cada jugador también recibe su propio terreno virtual sin desarrollar, junto con un conjunto de herramientas virtuales para diseñar y construir cualquier cosa: desde un rascacielos navegable o un helicóptero funcional, hasta una máquina de pinball gigante, un juego multijugador de "Captura la Bandera" o cualquier otra creación imaginable. Este primer terreno virtual es gratuito. Al participar y construir cosas increíbles, los miembros de ROBLOX pueden ganar insignias especiales y dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Con estos, pueden comprar ropa y accesorios para sus avatares en el catálogo en línea, así como materiales de construcción premium, componentes interactivos y mecanismos funcionales.

Что такое Roblox? ROBLOX — это онлайн-виртуальная игровая площадка и мастерская, где дети всех возрастов могут безопасно общаться, творить, развлекаться и учиться. Его уникальность заключается в том, что практически всё в ROBLOX создаётся и разрабатывается членами сообщества. ROBLOX предназначен для подростков от 13 до 18 лет, но открыт для людей всех возрастов. Каждый игрок начинает с выбора аватара и присвоения ему имени. Затем он может исследовать ROBLOX — взаимодействовать с другими, общаясь в чате, играя в игры или сотрудничая над творческими проектами. Каждому игроку также предоставляется собственный участок необработанной виртуальной земли вместе с виртуальным набором инструментов, с помощью которого можно проектировать и строить что угодно — будь то небоскрёб, по которому можно перемещаться, работающий вертолёт, гигантский пинбол, многопользовательская игра «Захват флага» или какое-либо другое, ещё не придуманное творение. Первый участок виртуальной земли предоставляется бесплатно. Участвуя и создавая интересные вещи, участники ROBLOX могут зарабатывать специальные значки, а также виртуальную валюту ROBLOX («Robux»). В свою очередь, они могут просматривать онлайн-каталог, чтобы приобрести одежду и аксессуары для аватаров, а также премиальные строительные материалы, интерактивные компоненты и рабочие механизмы.

ما هي روبلوكس؟ روبلوكس عبارة عن منصة ألعاب افتراضية تفاعلية، حيث يمكن للأطفال من جميع الأعمار التفاعل بأمان، والإبداع، والاستمتاع، والتعلم. ما يميز ROBLOX هو أن كل شيء تقريبًا فيه مصمم ومُنشأ من قِبل أعضاء المجتمع. صُمم ROBLOX للفئة العمرية من 13 إلى 18 عامًا، ولكنه متاح للجميع. يبدأ كل لاعب باختيار شخصية افتراضية وتحديد هويتها. بعد ذلك، يمكنه استكشاف عالم ROBLOX والتفاعل مع الآخرين من خلال الدردشة أو لعب الألعاب أو التعاون في مشاريع إبداعية. يُمنح كل لاعب أيضًا قطعة أرض افتراضية غير مطورة، بالإضافة إلى مجموعة أدوات افتراضية لتصميم وبناء أي شيء، سواء كان ناطحة سحاب قابلة للاستكشاف، أو طائرة هليكوبتر عاملة، أو آلة بينبول عملاقة، أو لعبة "الاستيلاء على العلم" متعددة اللاعبين، أو أي ابتكار آخر لم يخطر على بال أحد. هذه القطعة الأولى من الأرض الافتراضية مجانية. من خلال المشاركة وبناء أشياء رائعة، يمكن لأعضاء ROBLOX ربح شارات مميزة، بالإضافة إلى عملة ROBLOX (Robux). وبدورهم، يمكنهم التسوق من المتجر الإلكتروني لشراء ملابس وإكسسوارات لشخصياتهم الافتراضية، بالإضافة إلى مواد بناء مميزة، ومكونات تفاعلية، وآليات عاملة.

ఇన్‌స్టా: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

రోబ్లాక్స్ అంటే ఏమిటి? రోబ్లాక్స్ అనేది ఒక ఆన్‌లైన్ వర్చువల్ ప్లేగ్రౌండ్ మరియు వర్క్‌షాప్, ఇక్కడ అన్ని వయసుల పిల్లలు సురక్షితంగా ఒకరితో ఒకరు సంభాషించుకోవచ్చు, సృష్టించుకోవచ్చు, ఆనందించవచ్చు మరియు నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. ROBLOX లో దాదాపు ప్రతిదీ కమ్యూనిటీ సభ్యులచే రూపొందించబడి, నిర్మించబడటమే దీని ప్రత్యేకత. ROBLOX 13 నుండి 18 సంవత్సరాల వయస్సు గల వారి కోసం రూపొందించబడింది, కానీ ఇది అన్ని వయసుల వారికి అందుబాటులో ఉంటుంది. ప్రతి ఆటగాడు ఒక అవతార్‌ను ఎంచుకుని, దానికి ఒక గుర్తింపును ఇవ్వడం ద్వారా ప్రారంభిస్తాడు. ఆ తర్వాత వారు చాటింగ్ చేయడం, ఆటలు ఆడటం లేదా సృజనాత్మక ప్రాజెక్టులపై సహకరించుకోవడం ద్వారా ఇతరులతో సంభాషిస్తూ ROBLOX ను అన్వేషించవచ్చు. ప్రతి ఆటగాడికి వారి స్వంత అభివృద్ధి చెందని భూభాగంతో పాటు, ఒక వర్చువల్ టూల్‌బాక్స్ కూడా ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. దానితో వారు దేనినైనా డిజైన్ చేసి నిర్మించవచ్చు — అది ప్రయాణించగల ఆకాశహర్మ్యం కావచ్చు, పనిచేసే హెలికాప్టర్ కావచ్చు, ఒక పెద్ద పిన్‌బాల్ మెషిన్ కావచ్చు, మల్టీప్లేయర్ “క్యాప్చర్ ది ఫ్లాగ్” గేమ్ కావచ్చు లేదా ఇంకా ఊహించని మరేదైనా సృష్టి కావచ్చు. ఈ మొదటి వర్చువల్ భూభాగానికి ఎటువంటి ఖర్చు ఉండదు. పాల్గొనడం ద్వారా మరియు అద్భుతమైన వస్తువులను నిర్మించడం ద్వారా, ROBLOX సభ్యులు ప్రత్యేక బ్యాడ్జ్‌లతో పాటు ROBLOX డాలర్లను (“రోబక్స్”) సంపాదించవచ్చు. దీనికి ప్రతిగా, వారు ఆన్‌లైన్ కేటలాగ్‌లో అవతార్ దుస్తులు మరియు యాక్సెసరీలతో పాటు ప్రీమియం నిర్మాణ సామగ్రి, ఇంటరాక్టివ్ భాగాలు మరియు పనిచేసే యంత్రాంగాలను కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు.

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX — berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun — baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

Що таке Roblox? ROBLOX — це віртуальний онлайн-майстерня та майстерня, де діти різного віку можуть безпечно взаємодіяти, творити, розважатися та навчатися. Він унікальний тим, що практично все в ROBLOX розроблено та побудовано членами спільноти. ROBLOX розроблений для дітей віком від 13 до 18 років, але відкритий для людей будь-якого віку. Кожен гравець починає з вибору аватара та надання йому ідентичності. Потім вони можуть досліджувати ROBLOX — взаємодіяти з іншими через чат, ігри або співпрацювати над творчими проектами. Кожному гравцеві також надається власний шматок незабудованої нерухомості разом із віртуальним набором інструментів, за допомогою якого можна проектувати та будувати що завгодно — будь то хмарочос, яким можна керувати, робочий гелікоптер, гігантський пінбольний автомат, багатокористувацька гра «Захоплення прапора» чи якесь інше, ще не вигадане творіння. Ця перша ділянка віртуальної землі безкоштовна. Беручи участь та будуючи круті речі, учасники ROBLOX можуть заробляти спеціальні значки, а також долари ROBLOX («Robux»). У свою чергу, вони можуть купувати одяг та аксесуари для аватарів в онлайн-каталозі, а також преміальні будівельні матеріали, інтерактивні компоненти та робочі механізми.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்றால் என்ன? ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்பது ஒரு ஆன்லைன் மெய்நிகர் விளையாட்டுத் தளம் மற்றும் பட்டறை ஆகும், இங்கு அனைத்து வயது குழந்தைகளும் பாதுகாப்பாகப் பழகலாம், உருவாக்கலாம், மகிழலாம் மற்றும் கற்றுக்கொள்ளலாம். ROBLOX-இல் உள்ள அனைத்தும் சமூக உறுப்பினர்களால் வடிவமைக்கப்பட்டு உருவாக்கப்படுகின்றன என்பதில் இது தனித்துவமானது. ROBLOX 13 முதல் 18 வயதுடையவர்களுக்காக வடிவமைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது, ஆனால் இது எல்லா வயதினருக்கும் திறந்திருக்கும். ஒவ்வொரு வீரரும் ஒரு அவதாரத்தைத் தேர்ந்தெடுத்து அதற்கு ஒரு அடையாளத்தை வழங்குவதன் மூலம் தொடங்குகிறார்கள். பின்னர் அவர்கள் ROBLOX-ஐ ஆராயலாம் — அரட்டையடிப்பது, விளையாடுவது அல்லது ஆக்கப்பூர்வமான திட்டங்களில் இணைந்து பணியாற்றுவது போன்றவற்றின் மூலம் மற்றவர்களுடன் தொடர்பு கொள்ளலாம். ஒவ்வொரு வீரருக்கும், பயணிக்கக்கூடிய வானளாவிய கட்டிடம், இயங்கும் ஹெலிகாப்டர், ஒரு பெரிய பின்தட்டு இயந்திரம், பல வீரர்கள் விளையாடும் "கொடியைக் கைப்பற்று" விளையாட்டு அல்லது இதுவரை கனவு காணப்படாத வேறு ஏதேனும் ஒரு படைப்பு என எதையும் வடிவமைத்து உருவாக்க, ஒரு மெய்நிகர் கருவிப்பெட்டியுடன், மேம்படுத்தப்படாத சொந்த நிலமும் வழங்கப்படுகிறது. இந்த முதல் மெய்நிகர் நிலத்துண்டுக்கு எந்தக் கட்டணமும் இல்லை. பங்கேற்பதன் மூலமும், அருமையான பொருட்களை உருவாக்குவதன் மூலமும், ROBLOX உறுப்பினர்கள் சிறப்புப் பதக்கங்களையும் ROBLOX டாலர்களையும் ("Robux") சம்பாதிக்கலாம். இதன் மூலம், அவர்கள் ஆன்லைன் பட்டியலில் இருந்து அவதார் ஆடைகள் மற்றும் அணிகலன்கள், அத்துடன் பிரீமியம் கட்டுமானப் பொருட்கள், ஊடாடும் கூறுகள் மற்றும் இயங்கும் இயந்திர அமைப்புகளை வாங்கலாம்.

#ரோப்லாக்ஸ் #ஃபோல்டின்

snippet.title: Zara Larsson - Lush Life (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
⏬ Download / Stream: 
http://smarturl.it/LushLife

⚡️ Zara Larsson:
http://www.instagram.com/zaralarsson 
https://www.facebook.com/ZaraLarsson

https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Verse 1]
It was a crush
But I couldn't, couldn't get enough
It was a rush
But I gave it up
It was a crush
Now, I might've went and said too much
But that's all it was
So I gave it up

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Verse 2]
It was a crush
I kept sayin', "I'ma stay in touch"
But that thing went bust
So I gave it up, ooh
No tricks, no bluff
I'm just better off without them cuffs
Yeah, the sun won't set on us
Ooh, ooh, ooh, yeah, yeah

[Pre-Chorus]
Went low, went high
Still waters run dry
Gotta get back in the groove
I ain't ever worried
Went low, went high
What matters is now
Gettin' right back in the mood

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Post-Chorus]
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late

[Bridge]
Ooh, ooh-woah
Ooh, ooh-woah

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Post-Chorus]
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late

snippet.title: Ae Ajnabee (Official Music Video) - Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan | Coke Studio Bharat
snippet.description:
Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. It's for those who remember whispered poetry and those who send late-night texts - a celebration of modern romance rooted in emotion.

Listen to Ae Ajnabee: http://UMGI.lnk.to/AeAjnabee  

CREDITS

Composed & Performed by: Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan
Written by: Aditya Rikhari, Kutle Khan 
Producer: Ravator
Drums: Suyash Gabriel 
Keys: Swapnil Tare
Acoustic Guitar: Solomon Konwar Rengma
Tabla: Shariq Mustafa
Bass: Sashi Bhushan 
Sarangi: Vanraj Shastri
Mixed & Mastered by Mukul Jain at Ferris Wheel Studios
Recording Engineer: Jay Rana

In House Band

en-US.title: Ae Ajnabee (Official Music Video) - Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan | Coke Studio Bharat
en-US.description:
Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. It's for those who remember whispered poetry and those who send late-night texts - a celebration of modern romance rooted in emotion.

Listen to Ae Ajnabee: http://UMGI.lnk.to/AeAjnabee

snippet.title: Dr Billa Ka Sach 😱 | Kaal YT Ne Kalam Ko Dhokhebaaz Bolke Kick Kar Diya 💔| part -7 |
snippet.description:
Doctor Billa ne plan banaya tha ki wo Kaal YT ke saath meri doosti wapas karwa dega… lekin jo hua, usne sab kuch ulat diya! 😭  

Maine Kaal YT ko Prime Level 8 ID gift ki thi, phir bhi wo mujhe gaddar samajhta tha. Aaj Billa ne custom match mein mujhe bhi invite kiya taaki main usse baat kar saku. Lekin Kaal YT ne mic off kar liya.  

Lobby mein jaane ke baad Kaal YT ne Billa se ek hi sawal pucha – "Yeh ID aur guild kisne gift kiya? Tune ya Kalam ne?"  

Billa ne wahan palat ke bola – "Sab maine gift kiya hai."  

Us ek line ne meri puri mehnat, puri dosti ko barbaad kar diya. Kaal YT gusse mein bola – "Kalam tu dhokhebaaz hai! Tu kabhi mera dost nahi tha!" aur mujhe group se kick kar diya.  

Uske baad Billa mere group mein aaya aur bola – "Ab main Kaal YT ka bhi scam karunga, uski ID aur guild sab loot ke bhag jaunga… aur tu kuch nahi kar payega!" Usne mujhe bhi kick kar diya.  

Aakhir mein main akela reh gaya. Sabke nazar mein gaddar aur dhokhebaaz ban chuka tha. Tab meri girlfriend ne kaha – "Tension mat le, main Kaal YT ki girlfriend se baat karti hoon aur saare proofs bhejti hoon."  

Kya ab meri doosti wapas hogi? Ya sab kuch hamesha ke liye khatam ho chuka hai?  

Puri emotional story dekh lo 💔  

Like karo aur comment mein batao – aapke saath aisa hua hai kabhi?

**Tags:**  
#FreeFire #FreeFireIndia #KaalYT #KalamStory #DoctorBilla #FFDrama #PrimeID #PrimeLevel8 #FreeFireMax #EmotionalDrama #FriendshipBetrayal #FFGaming #FreeFireCommunity #GamingDrama #FreeFireViral #FreeFire2026 #FFShorts #FreeFireSquad #Garena #FreeFireLover #FreeFireMemes #FreeFireClips #BetrayalStory #FreeFireStory

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
#lanadelrey #7clouds #cinnamongirl
Thanks for watching my videos.🖤

Song: Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)

Follow 

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Cinnamon in my teeth
From your kiss, you're touching me
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work
You try to push me out, but I just find my way back in
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me out, I win

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

[Post-Chorus]
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did

[Verse 2]
Kerosene in my hands
You make me mad, on fire again
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

[Post-Chorus]
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
.........

LYRICS

ยิ่งเจอ ยิ่งลำบาก ลำบากใจทุกที
เห็นเธอต้องแชร์ด่วน แชร์ด่วน กด like ที
มองแล้วมันสั่น ทำหัวใจปั่น ไม่ให้หวั่น ยังไง

ชอบทำมาเป็นหยอด เดี๊ยะ เดี๊ยะโดนกอด
ชอบชวนมาคุยแบบคนรู้ใจ
อยู่ดีก็จ้องตา ชอบคอยส่งยิ้มมา เอ๊ะ เริ่มเกินไป

ก็แบบว่าขอหน่อย เม้นท์หน่อย ชักไม่โอเค
ทำงี้บ่อย งี้บ่อย ฉันเริ่มคาใจ
จะนับหนึ่งถึงหนึ่ง ถ้ายังกวนใจ อย่าโวยกันนะ

ก็บอกแล้วนะ เตือนแล้วนะ เล่นอย่างงี้หัวใจชา
ชอบมาตามองตา ชอบเข้ามาใกล้ชิดกัน
หน้าอย่างงี้ หน้าอย่างงี้ บอกเลยนะ ระวังตัว

bn.title: সমুদ্রের তলদেশের রহস্য | সম্পূর্ণ অ্যানিমেশন | ফ্রি ফায়ার অফিসিয়াল
bn.description:
আন্ডারসি মিস্ট্রি এসে গেছে, ডুব দেওয়ার জন্য প্রস্তুত তো? 🌊🐠অজানার গভীর থেকে, রহস্য, বিপদ এবং লুকানো ধন-সম্পদ অপেক্ষা করছে সেইসব সাহসী ডুবদাতাদের জন্য। সমুদ্রের রাজ্যে পা রাখুন, রহস্য উন্মোচন করুন এবং স্রোতের সাথে লড়াই করে আপনার পুরস্কার জিতে নিন। গভীর আপনাকে ডাকছে… আপনি কি সাড়া দেবেন?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah

de-DE.title: Unterwassergeheimnis | Vollständige Animation | Offizielles Free Fire-Format
de-DE.description:
Das Unterwasser-Geheimnis ist da! Bist du bereit einzutauchen? 🌊🐠 Aus den Tiefen des Unbekannten erwarten dich Geheimnisse, Gefahren und verborgene Schätze. Betritt die Welt des Ozeans, lüfte das Geheimnis und kämpfe dich durch die Strömungen, um deine Belohnungen zu sichern. Die Tiefe ruft … wirst du ihr folgen?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah

nl-NL.title: Onderzees Mysterie | Volledige animatie | Officieel Free Fire
nl-NL.description:
Undersea Mystery is er, ben je klaar om erin te duiken? 🌊🐠 Vanuit de diepten van het onbekende wachten geheimen, gevaren en verborgen schatten op degenen die dapper genoeg zijn om erin te duiken. Stap in het rijk van de oceaan, ontrafel het mysterie en vecht je een weg door de stromingen om je beloning te bemachtigen. De diepte roept... geef jij gehoor?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah

ml.title: അണ്ടർസീ മിസ്റ്ററി | പൂർണ്ണ ആനിമേഷൻ | ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ഒഫീഷ്യൽ
ml.description:
അണ്ടർസീ മിസ്റ്ററി ഇതാ വന്നിരിക്കുന്നു, നിങ്ങൾ അതിൽ മുങ്ങാൻ തയ്യാറാണോ? 🌊🐠അജ്ഞാതമായ ആഴങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന്, രഹസ്യങ്ങളും അപകടങ്ങളും മറഞ്ഞിരിക്കുന്ന നിധികളും മുങ്ങാൻ ധൈര്യമുള്ളവരെ കാത്തിരിക്കുന്നു. സമുദ്രത്തിന്റെ മണ്ഡലത്തിലേക്ക് കടക്കുക, നിഗൂഢത കണ്ടെത്തുകയും നിങ്ങളുടെ പ്രതിഫലം അവകാശപ്പെടാൻ പ്രവാഹങ്ങളിലൂടെ പോരാടുകയും ചെയ്യുക. ആഴം വിളിക്കുന്നു... നിങ്ങൾ ഉത്തരം നൽകുമോ?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah(

ko.description:
심해의 신비가 돌아왔습니다! 뛰어들 준비 되셨나요? 🌊🐠 미지의 심해에는 비밀과 위험, 숨겨진 보물이 기다리고 있습니다. 용감하게 뛰어드는 자들을 기다립니다. 바닷속으로 들어가 미스터리를 풀고, 거센 해류를 헤쳐나가 보상을 획득하세요. 심해가 당신을 부릅니다… 응답하시겠습니까?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah
